film.title: Enron: The Smartest Guys in the Room
film.overview: A documentary about the Enron corporation, its faulty and corrupt business practices, and how they led to its fall.

dialogues.dialogue: He's hiding something from the rest of us.  The fatal flaw at Enron  if there is one, you say it was pride  but then it was arrogance,  intolerance, greed,

by Jeff Skilling and became part of his inner circle.  The excitement was palpable.  You cannot imagine how proud we all were to be there.  And then, of course, we had a leader who imbued us  with a sense of confidence that if we were smart,
dialogues.cause_raw: being part of Jeff Skilling's inner circle

dialogues.dialogue: I guess it all came crashing down on him.  I think Cliff's suicide note tells it all.  You know, Where there was once great pride,  now there is none.  It's very hard for me to talk about Cliff.
